user.title: Precision Climate
user.description: Select the boiler switch. You can add rooms, schedules and everything else afterwards from the integration's Configure button.

data_description.notify_services: Choose one or more notify.* services to receive alerts. Leave empty for none.

error.duplicate_room: A room with that name already exists.
error.duplicate_room_name: Another room already uses that name.
error.empty_room_name: The room name cannot be empty.
error.entity_in_use: A TRV is already assigned to another room (valves cannot be shared; thermometers can).
error.hysteresis_both_zero: At least one of the upper/lower hysteresis values must be greater than 0.
error.schedule_coverage: The schedule must cover the whole day with no gaps: {detail}

init.title: Precision Climate
init.description: Add or manage rooms, and adjust general settings.

add_room.title: Room
add_room.description: Configure the room's entities and hysteresis. At least one hysteresis side may be 0, but not both.

data_description.lower_hysteresis: How far below target an active room drops before calling the boiler.
data_description.upper_hysteresis: How far above target before the room's TRV closes.

room_created.title: Room created
room_created.description: Room "{name}" was created with a default schedule (18 °C, active all day). To set its real schedule, open the Precision Climate Schedule card on your dashboard and edit it there.

trv_locks.title: TRV child locks
trv_locks.description: Optionally pick a child-lock entity (a switch or lock) for each TRV in "{name}". You can then engage or release these locks per room from the schedule card's configuration panel. Leave a field empty if a TRV has no child lock.

manage_rooms.title: Manage rooms
manage_rooms.description: Pick a room and an action. Edit reopens the room form pre-filled (the schedule is edited via the dashboard card); delete removes it.

settings.title: General settings
settings.description:
Default room is used whenever no room is active. Enable optional sunny-day savings, and choose which notifications to receive.

{detail}

data_description.boiler_switch: The switch that turns your boiler on and off. You can change it here without reinstalling.
data_description.notify_unauthorized_boiler: Boiler turned on while the system is off/paused or a window is open in an active room — it is forced back off.
data_description.notify_prolonged_heating: The boiler has been running continuously for over 5 hours.
data_description.notify_overheating: A heating room has exceeded the overheat threshold (24°C).
data_description.notify_trv_mismatch: A room that should be heating has a TRV target below its schedule target (the valve didn't take the open command).
data_description.notify_trv_unresponsive: The boiler ran 45 min but a heating room's temperature barely rose — likely an open window or a failed valve.
data_description.notify_trv_unavailable: A TRV went offline for over 15 minutes while its room was heating.
data_description.notify_window: A window opened in an active room and heating was suspended.
data_description.notify_sunny_day: Sunny-day savings reduced the active-room targets to save energy.

error.duplicate_room: A room with that name already exists.
error.duplicate_room_name: Another room already uses that name.
error.empty_room_name: The room name cannot be empty.
error.entity_in_use: A TRV is already assigned to another room (valves cannot be shared; thermometers can).
error.hysteresis_both_zero: At least one of the upper/lower hysteresis values must be greater than 0.
error.schedule_coverage: The schedule must cover the whole day with no gaps: {detail}

abort.no_rooms: There are no rooms to manage yet. Add one first.
